en.name: Temple Run
en.desc: Run, jump, and slide through endless obstacles!
en.description: Temple Run is an endless runner game where you control a character running through a temple path. Swipe to change lanes, jump over obstacles, or slide under barriers. Collect coins and see how far you can run!
en.objectives: Run as far as possible without hitting obstacles. Collect coins for bonus points. Switch lanes to avoid danger and survive.
en.howToPlay: Swipe left/right or use A/D keys to change lanes. Swipe up or press W to jump over obstacles. Swipe down or press S to slide under barriers. Avoid all obstacles to survive.

rules.controls: Swipe left/right or A/D to change lanes. Swipe up or W to jump. Swipe down or S to slide.
mechanics: Slide to pass under high barriers

tips: Timing is crucial for jumps and slides
Stay in the center lane when possible for more options
Collect coins to increase your score

faq.question: How do I change lanes?
faq.answer: Swipe left or right on the screen, or press A or D keys to switch between the three lanes.

faq.question: What happens if I hit an obstacle?
faq.answer: Game over! You need to start again from the beginning.

faq.question: How do I get a high score?
faq.answer: Run as far as possible and collect coins. The longer you survive, the higher your score!

zh.name: 神庙逃亡
zh.description: 神庙逃亡是一款无尽跑酷游戏，你控制角色在神庙道路上奔跑。滑动切换跑道、跳跃越过障碍或滑行穿过屏障。收集金币看看你能跑多远！
zh.objectives: 尽可能跑得远，不要撞到障碍物。收集金币获得额外分数。切换跑道躲避危险并生存下去。
zh.howToPlay: 左右滑动或使用A/D键切换跑道。向上滑动或按W键跳过障碍。向下滑动或按S键从屏障下滑过。避开所有障碍物生存下去。

rules.controls: 左右滑动或A/D切换跑道。向上滑动或W跳跃。向下滑动或S滑行。
mechanics: 收集金币获得额外分数

tips: 提前观察即将到来的障碍
跳跃和滑行的时机至关重要
尽可能待在中间跑道有更多选择
收集金币增加你的分数

faq.question: 如何切换跑道？
faq.answer: 在屏幕上左右滑动，或按A或D键在三条跑道之间切换。

faq.question: 撞到障碍物会怎样？
faq.answer: 游戏结束！你需要从头开始。

faq.question: 如何获得高分？
faq.answer: 尽可能跑得远并收集金币。生存时间越长，分数越高！
